phrases.intent_en: Ask where the consultation area is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el área de consulta privada?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh es-TAH el AH-reh-ah deh kon-SOOL-tah pree-VAH-dah?

likely_response.local: Al fondo, detrás del mostrador principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHTRÁS DEHL moh-strah-DOHR preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, behind the main counter.

responses.english: At the back, behind the main counter.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHTRÁS DEHL moh-strah-DOHR preen-thee-PAHL
responses.local: Al fondo, detrás del mostrador principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to describe symptoms to the pharmacist
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo debo describir mis síntomas exactamente?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KOH-moh DEH-boh dehs-kree-BEER mees SEEN-toh-mahs eh-sahk-TAH-mehn-teh?

likely_response.local: Explique duración e intensidad, yo le haré preguntas específicas.
likely_response.pronunciation: ehksp-lee-K-eh doo-rah-thee-ÓN EH een-tehn-see-DAHD YOH LEH ah-RÉ preh-GOON-tahs eh-speh-THÍ-fee-kahs
likely_response.translation_en: Explain duration and intensity, I will ask specific questions.

responses.english: Explain duration and intensity, I will ask specific questions.
responses.phonetic: ehksp-lee-K-eh doo-rah-thee-ÓN EH een-tehn-see-DAHD YOH LEH ah-RÉ preh-GOON-tahs eh-speh-THÍ-fee-kahs
responses.local: Explique duración e intensidad, yo le haré preguntas específicas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the nearest 24-hour pharmacy
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde hay una farmacia de guardia abierta?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs DÓN-deh AHY OO-nah fahr-mah-THEE-ah DEH g-ahr-DEE-ah ah-bee-EHR-tah

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the map on the wall.

responses.english: It is indicated on the map on the wall.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the payment counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la caja para pagar?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah KAH-hah PAH-rah pah-GAHR?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador principal, al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR preen-thee-PAHL AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: At the main counter, at the back.

responses.english: At the main counter, at the back.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR preen-thee-PAHL AHL FOHN-doh
responses.local: En el mostrador principal, al fondo.
